revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages with former wikipedia userpage links]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.

This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.

The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had [[:en:Yashimajinumi|Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had [[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]].
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is one of the [[Category:17_spirits_of_the_world]]{{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}}. This god married [[:en:Konohanachiru-hime|Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of [[:en:Kuraokami|Kuraokami]]) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
